title: Lab 47: Per-User Password Aging
description: Adjust password aging for an existing user account with chage

tasks: Create user cycle47 with password cinder9 if it does not already exist.
Configure cycle47 with a maximum password age of 30 days, a minimum age of 2 days, and a warning period of 7 days.
Force cycle47 to change the password at the next login.
hints: Use chage, not manual edits to /etc/shadow.
checks: chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Minimum number of days between password change[^0-9]*2$' && chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Maximum number of days between password change[^0-9]*30$' && chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Number of days of warning before password expires[^0-9]*7$' && chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Last password change[^:]*: password must be changed'
task_titles: Create user cycle47 with password cinder9 if it...
Configure cycle47 with a maximum password age of 30...
Force cycle47 to change the password at the next login
